Local Open Scope cat.

Section Dialgebra.
  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          (F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂).

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
disp_cat C₁

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
disp_cat C₁

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
C₁ → UU
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ x y : C₁, ?P x → ?P y → C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ (x y : C₁) (a : ?P x) (b : ?P y) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop (?H x y a b f)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ (x : C₁) (a : ?P x), ?H x x a a (identity x)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ (x y z : C₁) (a : ?P x) (b : ?P y) (c : ?P z)
(f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
?H x y a b f → ?H y z b c g → ?H x z a c (f · g)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
C₁ → UU
 exact (λ x, F x --> G x).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ x y : C₁,
(λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) x
→ (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) y → C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact (λ x y hx hy f, hx · #G f = #F f · hy).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ (x y : C₁) (a : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) x)
(b : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) y)
(f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop
  ((λ (x0 y0 : C₁)
    (hx : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) x0)
    (hy : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) y0)
    (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), hx · # G f0 = # F f0 · hy) x
     y a b f)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
a: (λ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧) x
b: (λ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧) y
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ (x y : C₁)
    (hx : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) x)
    (hy : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) y)
    (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), hx · # G f = # F f · hy) x y a
     b f)
 apply C₂.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ (x : C₁) (a : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) x),
(λ (x0 y : C₁)
 (hx : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) x0)
 (hy : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) y)
 (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧), hx · # G f = # F f · hy) x x a a
  (identity x)
 abstract (intros x hx ; cbn;
      rewrite !functor_id;
      rewrite id_left, id_right;
      apply idpath).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ (x y z : C₁) (a : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) x)
(b : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) y)
(c : (λ x0 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x0, G x0 ⟧) z)
(f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
(λ (x0 y0 : C₁)
 (hx : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) x0)
 (hy : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) y0)
 (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), hx · # G f0 = # F f0 · hy) x y
  a b f
→ (λ (x0 y0 : C₁)
   (hx : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) x0)
   (hy : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) y0)
   (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), hx · # G f0 = # F f0 · hy) y
    z b c g
  → (λ (x0 y0 : C₁)
     (hx : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) x0)
     (hy : (λ x1 : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x1, G x1 ⟧) y0)
     (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧), hx · # G f0 = # F f0 · hy)
      x z a c (f · g)
 abstract (intros x y z f g hx hy hz hf hg ; cbn in *;
      rewrite !functor_comp;
      rewrite !assoc;
      rewrite hf;
      rewrite !assoc';
      rewrite hg;
      apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
locally_propositional dialgebra_disp_cat

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
locally_propositional dialgebra_disp_cat

    red; intros; apply C₂.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: dialgebra_disp_cat x
hy: dialgebra_disp_cat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) hf

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: dialgebra_disp_cat x
hy: dialgebra_disp_cat y
hf: hx -->[ f] hy
is_z_iso_disp (make_z_iso' f Hf) hf

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
hy · # G (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)) =
# F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
(?Goal ;; hf)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp hy hy) (pr2 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (id_disp hy)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
(hf ;; ?Goal)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp hx hx) (pr1 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (id_disp hx)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
hy · # G (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)) =
# F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
hy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf))
· hx

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf))
· hx =
hy
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf))

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
hy =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf))
· hx · functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf))
· hx · functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf) = hy

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf))
· (hx · functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)) = hy

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
hx · functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf) =
functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf) · hy

      exact hf.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
(internal_paths_rew_r (C₂ ⟦ G y, G x ⟧)
   (# G (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
   (inv_from_z_iso
      (functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
   (λ p : C₂ ⟦ G y, G x ⟧,
    hy · p =
    # F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx)
   (internal_paths_rew_r (C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧)
      (# F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
      (inv_from_z_iso
         (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
      (λ p : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
       hy
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)) =
       p · hx)
      (! z_iso_inv_on_left (F y) (G x) (G y)
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf))
            · hx)
           (functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)) hy
           (! internal_paths_rew_r (C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧)
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (functor_on_z_iso F
                      (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx
                 · functor_on_z_iso G
                     (make_z_iso' f Hf))
                (inv_from_z_iso
                   (functor_on_z_iso F
                      (make_z_iso' f Hf))
                 · (hx
                    · functor_on_z_iso G
                        (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
                (λ p : C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧, p = hy)
                (z_iso_inv_on_right (F x) (F y) (G y)
                   (functor_on_z_iso F
                      (make_z_iso' f Hf)) hy
                   (hx
                    · functor_on_z_iso G
                        (make_z_iso' f Hf)) hf)
                (assoc'
                   (inv_from_z_iso
                      (functor_on_z_iso F
                         (make_z_iso' f Hf))) hx
                   (functor_on_z_iso G
                      (make_z_iso' f Hf)))))
      (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
   (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)) ;; hf)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp hy hy) (pr2 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (id_disp hy)
 apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
hx: C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧
hf: hx · # G f = # F f · hy
(hf ;; internal_paths_rew_r (C₂ ⟦ G y, G x ⟧)
         (# G (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (functor_on_z_iso G (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
         (λ p : C₂ ⟦ G y, G x ⟧,
          hy · p =
          # F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx)
         (internal_paths_rew_r (C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧)
            (# F (inv_from_z_iso (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (functor_on_z_iso F (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
            (λ p : C₂ ⟦ F y, F x ⟧,
             hy
             · inv_from_z_iso
                 (functor_on_z_iso G
                    (make_z_iso' f Hf)) = p · hx)
            (! z_iso_inv_on_left (F y) (G x) (G y)
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (functor_on_z_iso F
                       (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx)
                 (functor_on_z_iso G
                    (make_z_iso' f Hf)) hy
                 (! internal_paths_rew_r
                      (C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧)
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (functor_on_z_iso F
                            (make_z_iso' f Hf)) · hx
                       · functor_on_z_iso G
                           (make_z_iso' f Hf))
                      (inv_from_z_iso
                         (functor_on_z_iso F
                            (make_z_iso' f Hf))
                       · (hx
                          · functor_on_z_iso G
                              (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
                      (λ p : C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧, p = hy)
                      (z_iso_inv_on_right (F x) (F y)
                         (G y)
                         (functor_on_z_iso F
                            (make_z_iso' f Hf)) hy
                         (hx
                          · functor_on_z_iso G
                              (make_z_iso' f Hf)) hf)
                      (assoc'
                         (inv_from_z_iso
                            (functor_on_z_iso F
                               (make_z_iso' f Hf))) hx
                         (functor_on_z_iso G
                            (make_z_iso' f Hf)))))
            (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso F
               (make_z_iso' f Hf)))
         (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso G
            (make_z_iso' f Hf)))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp hx hx) (pr1 (make_z_iso' f Hf))
  (id_disp hx)
 apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
groupoidal_disp_cat dialgebra_disp_cat

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
groupoidal_disp_cat dialgebra_disp_cat

    intro; intros; apply is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra.
  Defined.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_univalent_disp dialgebra_disp_cat

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_univalent_disp dialgebra_disp_cat

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isweq
  (λ ee : transportf dialgebra_disp_cat (idpath x) hx =
          hy, idtoiso_disp (idpath x) ee)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
→ transportf dialgebra_disp_cat (idpath x) hx = hy
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isaprop
  (transportf dialgebra_disp_cat (idpath x) hx = hy)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isaprop (z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy)

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
→ transportf dialgebra_disp_cat (idpath x) hx = hy
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
transportf dialgebra_disp_cat (idpath x) hx = hy

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
hx = hx · # G (identity x)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
# F (identity x) · hy = hy

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
hx = hx · # G (identity x)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
hx = hx · identity (G x)

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
hx = hx

        apply idpath.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
# F (identity x) · hy = hy
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
i: z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy
identity (F x) · hy = hy

        apply id_left.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isaprop
  (transportf dialgebra_disp_cat (idpath x) hx = hy)
 apply homset_property.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isaprop (z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) hx hy)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)))
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
∏ x0 y : hx -->[ idtoiso (idpath x)] hy,
is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) x0
→ is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) y → x0 = y

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
isPredicate (is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
x0: hx -->[ idtoiso (idpath x)] hy
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) x0)

        apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
∏ x0 y : hx -->[ idtoiso (idpath x)] hy,
is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) x0
→ is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) y → x0 = y
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
hx, hy: dialgebra_disp_cat x
x0, y: hx -->[ idtoiso (idpath x)] hy
X: is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) x0
X0: is_z_iso_disp (idtoiso (idpath x)) y
x0 = y

        apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  Definition dialgebra : category
    := total_category dialgebra_disp_cat.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
is_univalent dialgebra

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
is_univalent dialgebra

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
is_univalent C₁
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
is_univalent_disp dialgebra_disp_cat

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
is_univalent C₁
 exact H₁.
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
is_univalent_disp dialgebra_disp_cat
 apply is_univalent_dialgebra_disp_cat.
  Defined.

  Definition make_dialgebra
             (x : C₁)
             (f : F x --> G x)
    : dialgebra
    := x ,, f.

  Definition dialgebra_mor_path
             {x y : dialgebra}
             (f : pr1 x --> pr1 y)
    : UU
    := pr2 x · # G f = # F f · pr2 y.

  Definition make_dialgebra_mor
             {x y : dialgebra}
             (f : pr1 x --> pr1 y)
             (p : dialgebra_mor_path f)
    : x --> y
    := f ,, p.

  Definition dialgebra_pr1 : dialgebra ⟶ C₁ := pr1_category _.

(** Equivalence between nat. transformations and functors into the dialgebras

    This is a simplification of the exercise 4 on p.47 in the 2nd edition of MacLane's book.
    Appears in a less streamlined form in the CPP'22 paper by Ahrens, Matthes and Mörtberg. *)

(** This direction could also be spelt out more elementarily without sections. *)
  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
section_disp dialgebra_disp_cat

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
section_disp dialgebra_disp_cat

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
section_disp_axioms ?pr1

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  ?pr1

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c: C₁
dialgebra_disp_cat c
 exact (η c).

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  (λ c : C₁, η c)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c, c': C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧
η c -->[ f] η c'

          
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c, c': C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧
pr2 dialgebra_disp_cat c c' (η c) (η c') f
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c, c': C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧
pr2
  (disp_struct C₁ (λ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧)
     (λ (x y : C₁) (hx : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧)
      (hy : C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      hx · # G f = # F f · hy)
     (λ (x y : C₁) (a : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧)
      (b : C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
      pr2 C₂ (F x) (G y) (a · # G f) (# F f · b))
     dialgebra_disp_cat_subproof
     dialgebra_disp_cat_subproof0) c c' (η c) (η c') f
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c, c': C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧
η c · # G f = # F f · η c'

          apply pathsinv0, nat_trans_ax.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
section_disp_axioms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   ((λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ((! nat_trans_ax η c c' f
       :
       pr2
         (disp_struct C₁ (λ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧)
            (λ (x y : C₁) (hx : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧)
             (hy : C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧)
             (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             hx · # G f0 = # F f0 · hy)
            (λ (x y : C₁) (a : C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧)
             (b : C₂ ⟦ F y, G y ⟧) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             pr2 C₂ (F x) (G y) (a · # G f0)
               (# F f0 · b))
            dialgebra_disp_cat_subproof
            dialgebra_disp_cat_subproof0) c c' (η c)
         (η c') f)
      :
      pr2 dialgebra_disp_cat c c' (η c) (η c') f)
     :
     η c -->[ f] η c')
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
     ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) (λ c : C₁, η c)))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
    ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) (identity x) =
id_disp
  (((λ c : C₁, η c),,
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) x)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
    ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f0)) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms
   ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f0)) f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
                                        (λ (c c' : C₁)
                                         (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c,
                                               c' ⟧),
                                         ! nat_trans_ax
                                             η c c' f0))
                                       g)%mor_disp

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
    ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) (identity x) =
id_disp
  (((λ c : C₁, η c),,
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) x)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c: C₁
section_disp_on_morphisms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
    ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) (identity c) =
id_disp
  (((λ c : C₁, η c),,
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) c)

          apply C₂.
        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
    ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f0)) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms
   ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f0)) f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
                                        (λ (c c' : C₁)
                                         (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c,
                                               c' ⟧),
                                         ! nat_trans_ax
                                             η c c' f0))
                                       g)%mor_disp
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
c1, c2, c3: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧
f': C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms
  ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
    ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) (f · f') =
(section_disp_on_morphisms
   ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax η c c' f)) f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                      ((λ c : C₁, η c),,
                                       (λ (c c' : C₁)
                                        (f : C₁ ⟦ c,
                                             c' ⟧),
                                        ! nat_trans_ax
                                            η c c' f))
                                      f')%mor_disp

          apply C₂.
    Defined.

    Definition nat_trans_to_functor (η: F ⟹ G): C₁ ⟶ dialgebra :=
      @section_functor C₁ dialgebra_disp_cat (nat_trans_to_section η).

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
nat_trans_to_functor η ∙ dialgebra_pr1 =
functor_identity C₁

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
η: F ⟹ G
nat_trans_to_functor η ∙ dialgebra_pr1 =
functor_identity C₁

      apply from_section_functor.
    Defined.

(** the backwards direction essentially uses the sections - already for the statements *)
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
section_disp dialgebra_disp_cat → F ⟹ G

F ⟹ G

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
F ⟹ G

section_to_nat_trans (nat_trans_to_section η) = η

section_to_nat_trans (nat_trans_to_section η) = η

c: C₁
section_to_nat_trans (nat_trans_to_section η) c = η c

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sd: section_disp dialgebra_disp_cat
nat_trans_to_section (section_to_nat_trans sd) = sd

 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp

  (section_to_nat_trans
     ((sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp)) =
(sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp

(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),

   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
((λ c : C₁,
  make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
    (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
     ! sdmor c0 c' f) c),,
 (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
  ! nat_trans_ax
      (make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
         (λ (c0 c'0 : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c'0 ⟧),
          ! sdmor c0 c'0 f0)) c c' f)),,
(λ c : C₁,
 pr1
   (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c)
      (((λ c0 : C₁,
         make_nat_trans F G (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
           (λ (c1 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c' ⟧),
            ! sdmor c1 c' f) c0),,
        (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
         ! nat_trans_ax
             (make_nat_trans F G (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
                (λ (c1 c'0 : C₁)
                 (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c1, c'0 ⟧),
                 ! sdmor c1 c'0 f0)) c0 c' f)) c
       · # G (identity c))
      (# F (identity c)
       · ((λ c0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans F G (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
             (λ (c1 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c1 c' f) c0),,
          (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans F G
                  (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
                  (λ (c1 c'0 : C₁)
                   (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c1, c'0 ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c1 c'0 f0)) c0 c' f)) c)
      (section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ c0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans F G (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
             (λ (c1 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c1 c' f) c0),,
          (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans F G
                  (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
                  (λ (c1 c'0 : C₁)
                   (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c1, c'0 ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c1 c'0 f0)) c0 c' f))
         (identity c))
      (id_disp
         (((λ c0 : C₁,
            make_nat_trans F G (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
              (λ (c1 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c' ⟧),
               ! sdmor c1 c' f) c0),,
           (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
            ! nat_trans_ax
                (make_nat_trans F G
                   (λ c1 : C₁, sdob c1)
                   (λ (c1 c'0 : C₁)
                    (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c1, c'0 ⟧),
                    ! sdmor c1 c'0 f0)) c0 c' f)) c)))),,
(λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
 (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
 pr1
   (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3)
      (((λ c : C₁,
         make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
           (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
            ! sdmor c0 c' f0) c),,
        (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
         ! nat_trans_ax
             (make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
                (λ (c0 c'0 : C₁)
                 (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c'0 ⟧),
                 ! sdmor c0 c'0 f1)) c c' f0)) c1
       · # G (f · f'))
      (# F (f · f')
       · ((λ c : C₁,
           make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
             (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c0 c' f0) c),,
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans F G
                  (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
                  (λ (c0 c'0 : C₁)
                   (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c'0 ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c0 c'0 f1)) c c' f0)) c3)
      (section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ c : C₁,
           make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
             (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c0 c' f0) c),,
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans F G
                  (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
                  (λ (c0 c'0 : C₁)
                   (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c'0 ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c0 c'0 f1)) c c' f0))
         (f · f'))
      (section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ c : C₁,
           make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
             (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c0 c' f0) c),,
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans F G
                  (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
                  (λ (c0 c'0 : C₁)
                   (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c'0 ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c0 c'0 f1)) c c' f0)) f ;; 
       section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ c : C₁,
           make_nat_trans F G (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
             (λ (c0 c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c0 c' f0) c),,
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans F G
                  (λ c0 : C₁, sdob c0)
                  (λ (c0 c'0 : C₁)
                   (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c0, c'0 ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c0 c'0 f1)) c c' f0)) f')%mor_disp)) =
(sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
 (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! (! sdmor c c' f))),,
(λ c : C₁,
 pr1
   (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c) (sdob c · # G (identity c))
      (# F (identity c) · sdob c)
      (! (! sdmor c c (identity c)))
      (id_disp (sdob c)))),,
(λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
 (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
 pr1
   (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3) (sdob c1 · # G (f · f'))
      (# F (f · f') · sdob c3)
      (! (! sdmor c1 c3 (f · f')))
      (! (! sdmor c1 c2 f) ;; (! (! sdmor c2 c3 f')))%mor_disp)) =
(sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
(λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! (! sdmor c c' f)) =
sdob,, sdmor
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat,
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; 
       section_disp_on_morphisms x g)%mor_disp)) 
  ?Goal
  ((λ c : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c) 
         (sdob c · # G (identity c))
         (# F (identity c) · sdob c)
         (! (! sdmor c c (identity c)))
         (id_disp (sdob c)))),,
   (λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
    (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3) 
         (sdob c1 · # G (f · f'))
         (# F (f · f') · sdob c3)
         (! (! sdmor c1 c3 (f · f')))
         (! (! sdmor c1 c2 f) ;; 
          (! (! sdmor c2 c3 f')))%mor_disp))) =
sdid,, sdcomp

      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
(λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! (! sdmor c c' f)) =
sdob,, sdmor
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ c : C₁, sdob c) = sdob
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 · # G f = # F f · x y) 
  ?Goal0
  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
   ! (! sdmor c c' f)) = sdmor

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ c : C₁, sdob c) = sdob
 apply idpath.
        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
   ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 · # G f = # F f · x y)
  (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c))
  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
   ! (! sdmor c c' f)) = sdmor
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! (! sdmor c c' f)) =
sdmor

          
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
x, x0: C₁
x1: C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
! (! sdmor x x0 x1) = sdmor x x0 x1

          apply pathsinv0inv0.
      
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat,
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G f = # F f · sdob y)
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G f = # F f · sdob t)
             (λ (c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧),
              ! (! sdmor x c' f)) (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G t = # F t · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧),
               ! (! sdmor x c' f)) ~ sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor c c' f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G f = # F f · x y)
         (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c))
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor c c' f)))) =
      pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ c : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c) (sdob c · # G (identity c))
         (# F (identity c) · sdob c)
         (! (! sdmor c c (identity c)))
         (id_disp (sdob c)))),,
   (λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
    (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3) (sdob c1 · # G (f · f'))
         (# F (f · f') · sdob c3)
         (! (! sdmor c1 c3 (f · f')))
         (! (! sdmor c1 c2 f) ;; (! (! sdmor c2 c3 f')))%mor_disp))) =
sdid,, sdcomp
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat,
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G f = # F f · sdob y)
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G f = # F f · sdob t)
             (λ (c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧),
              ! (! sdmor x c' f)) (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G t = # F t · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧),
               ! (! sdmor x c' f)) ~ sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor c c' f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G f = # F f · x y)
         (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c))
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor c c' f)))) =
      pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ c : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c) (sdob c · # G (identity c))
         (# F (identity c) · sdob c)
         (! (! sdmor c c (identity c)))
         (id_disp (sdob c)))),,
   (λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
    (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3) (sdob c1 · # G (f · f'))
         (# F (f · f') · sdob c3)
         (! (! sdmor c1 c3 (f · f')))
         (! (! sdmor c1 c2 f) ;; (! (! sdmor c2 c3 f')))%mor_disp))) =
sdid,, sdcomp

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop goaltype
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
Hprop: isaprop goaltype
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat,
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; 
       section_disp_on_morphisms x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = 
      pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G f = # F f · sdob y)
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G f = # F f · sdob t)
             (λ (c' : C₁) 
              (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧), ! 
              (! sdmor x c' f)) 
             (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G t = # F t · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) 
                 (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ 
                  sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (c' : C₁) 
               (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧), ! 
               (! sdmor x c' f)) ~ 
              sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (c c' : C₁) 
           (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! 
           (! sdmor c c' f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G f = # F f · x y)
         (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c))
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) 
             (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! 
             (! sdmor c c' f))) = 
         pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) 
             (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! 
             (! sdmor c c' f)))) = 
      pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ c : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c) 
         (sdob c · # G (identity c))
         (# F (identity c) · sdob c)
         (! (! sdmor c c (identity c)))
         (id_disp (sdob c)))),,
   (λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
    (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3) 
         (sdob c1 · # G (f · f'))
         (# F (f · f') · sdob c3)
         (! (! sdmor c1 c3 (f · f')))
         (! (! sdmor c1 c2 f) ;; 
          (! (! sdmor c2 c3 f')))%mor_disp))) =
sdid,, sdcomp

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
Hprop: isaprop goaltype
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data dialgebra_disp_cat,
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G f = # F f · sdob y)
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G f = # F f · sdob t)
             (λ (c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧),
              ! (! sdmor x c' f)) (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G t = # F t · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, c' ⟧),
               ! (! sdmor x c' f)) ~ sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor c c' f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F x, G x ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G f = # F f · x y)
         (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c))
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor c c' f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor c c' f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ c : C₁, sdob c),,
            (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor c c' f)))) =
      pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ c : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c) (G c) (sdob c · # G (identity c))
         (# F (identity c) · sdob c)
         (! (! sdmor c c (identity c)))
         (id_disp (sdob c)))),,
   (λ (c1 c2 c3 : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c1, c2 ⟧)
    (f' : C₁ ⟦ c2, c3 ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₂ (F c1) (G c3) (sdob c1 · # G (f · f'))
         (# F (f · f') · sdob c3)
         (! (! sdmor c1 c3 (f · f')))
         (! (! sdmor c1 c2 f) ;; (! (! sdmor c2 c3 f')))%mor_disp))) =
sdid,, sdcomp
 apply Hprop. 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop goaltype

  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =

(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =

   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ x : C₁, sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),

sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =

(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =

 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp)

        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ x : C₁, sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
∏ t : C₁,
isofhlevel 1
  (sdmor t t (identity t) = id_disp (sdob t))
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
c: C₁
isofhlevel 1
  (sdmor c c (identity c) = id_disp (sdob c))

          
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
c: C₁
isofhlevel 0
  (sdmor c c (identity c) = id_disp (sdob c))

          apply C₂.
        
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (sdmor t t1 (t2 · t3) =
   (sdmor t t0 t2 ;; sdmor t0 t1 t3)%mor_disp)

          
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁, dialgebra_disp_cat x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
isofhlevel 0
  (sdmor t t1 (t2 · t3) =
   (sdmor t t0 t2 ;; sdmor t0 t1 t3)%mor_disp)

          apply C₂.
    Qed.

End Dialgebra.


C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
univalent_category

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
univalent_category

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
category

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_univalent ?C

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
category
 exact (dialgebra F G).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_univalent (dialgebra F G)
 
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_univalent C₁

    exact (pr2 C₁).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
f = g


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
f = g

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 y))
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
pr1 f = pr1 g

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
isPredicate (mor_disp (pr2 x) (pr2 y))

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
x0: C₁ ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧
isaprop (pr2 x -->[ x0] pr2 y)

    apply homset_property.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f, g: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
pr1 f = pr1 g

  exact p.
Qed.

x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)
 exact Hf.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)
is_z_iso_disp (pr1 f,, Hf) (pr2 f)
 apply is_z_iso_disp_dialgebra.
Defined.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)

    exact Hf.
Defined.


Definition from_is_z_iso_dialgebra
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {x y : dialgebra F G}
           (f : x --> y)
           (Hf : is_z_isomorphism f)
  : is_z_isomorphism (pr1 f)
  := pr2 (functor_on_z_iso (dialgebra_pr1 F G) (make_z_iso' _ Hf)).

Definition from_z_iso_dialgebra
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {x y : dialgebra F G}
           (f : z_iso x y)
  : z_iso (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
  := functor_on_z_iso (dialgebra_pr1 F G) f.

Definition dialgebra_nat_trans_data
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : nat_trans_data
      (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
      (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G)
  := λ x, pr2 x.


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_trans (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
  (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G)
  (dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G)


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_trans (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
  (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G)
  (dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F) f
· dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G y =
dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G x
· # (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G) f

  exact (!(pr2 f)).
Qed.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F ⟹ dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G

dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F ⟹ dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G

nat_trans_data (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
  (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G)
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_trans (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
  (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G) ?t

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
nat_trans_data (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
  (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G)
 exact (dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_trans (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ F)
  (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ G)
  (dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G)
 exact (dialgebra_nat_trans_is_nat_trans F G).
Defined.

functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K

section_disp_data
  (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
     (dialgebra_disp_cat F G))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
section_disp_axioms ?pr1

F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
section_disp_data
  (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
     (dialgebra_disp_cat F G))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
  x
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
         Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
           (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
  x
 exact (λ x, α x).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
(λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
         Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
           (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
 ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
  (λ x : C₁, α x)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α x -->[ f] α y

      exact (!(nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
section_disp_axioms
  ((λ x : C₁, α x),,
   ((λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     ! nat_trans_ax α x y f)
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏ x : C₁,
             Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
               (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
     ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) (λ x : C₁, α x)))
 split; intros; apply C₃.
Defined.

Definition nat_trans_to_dialgebra
           {C₁ C₂ C₃ : category}
           {F G : C₂ ⟶ C₃}
           (K : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
           (α : K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G)
  : C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
  := lifted_functor (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α).
(** [nat_trans_to_functor] above is essentially a specialization of this construction *)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
is_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K
  ?t

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K
 exact (λ _, identity _).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
is_nat_trans
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K
  (λ x : C₁,
   identity
     ((nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G)
        x))
 abstract
      (intros x y f ; cbn ;
       rewrite id_left, id_right ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_z_iso
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K

K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_z_iso
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
is_nat_z_iso ?μ

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K
 exact (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_pr1 K α).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
is_nat_z_iso (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_pr1 K α)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
c: C₁
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_pr1 K α c)

    apply identity_is_z_iso.
Defined.

(** a more generic way of obtaining it: *)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_z_iso
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_z_iso
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G) K

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
z_iso (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G)
  K

  exact (idtoiso (C:=[C₁, C₂]) (from_lifted_functor (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α))).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K

  exact (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_pr1_alt_nat_z_iso K α).
Defined.

F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
→ K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G

F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂

Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G

  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x

sdob x -->[ f] sdob y

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
is_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G) ?t

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
c: C₁
C₃ ⟦ (K ∙ F) c, (K ∙ G) c ⟧
 exact (sdob c).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
is_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
  ((λ c : C₁, sdob c) : nat_trans_data (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
c, c': C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (K ∙ F) f · sdob c' = sdob c · # (K ∙ G) f

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
c, c': C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧
sdob c · # (K ∙ G) f = # (K ∙ F) f · sdob c'

    exact (sdmor c c' f).
Defined.
(** [section_to_nat_trans] above is essentially a specialization of this construction *)

(** we obtain [dialgebra_nat_trans] as an instance of this construction *)

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂

     (dialgebra_disp_cat F G))

section_disp_axioms ?pr1
