C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : dialgebra F G,
         Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat
           (dialgebra_pr1 F G)
           (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
 ∏ (x y : dialgebra F G) (f : dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) ?pr1

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
∏ x : dialgebra F G,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat (dialgebra_pr1 F G)
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
 exact (λ x, pr2 x).
    
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
(λ Fob : ∏ x : dialgebra F G,
         Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat
           (dialgebra_pr1 F G)
           (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
 ∏ (x y : dialgebra F G) (f : dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 Fob x -->[ f] Fob y) (λ x : dialgebra F G, pr2 x)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y
 
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr2 x · # G (pr1 f) = # F (pr1 f) · pr2 y

      exact (pr2 f).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
section_disp_axioms
  ((λ x : dialgebra F G, pr2 x),,
   ((λ (x y : dialgebra F G)
     (f : dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     pr2 f : pr2 x -->[ f] pr2 y)
    :
    (λ Fob : ∏ x : dialgebra F G,
             Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat
               (dialgebra_pr1 F G)
               (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
     ∏ (x y : dialgebra F G)
     (f : dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧), Fob x -->[ f] Fob y)
      (λ x : dialgebra F G, pr2 x)))
 split; intros; apply C₂.
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α) = α


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α) = α

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
∏ x : C₁,
dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α) x = α x

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
c: C₁
dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α) c = α c

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K
  (dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl) = fl


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K
  (dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl) = fl

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K
  (dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K
     ((sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp)) =
(sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
((λ x : C₁,
  make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G) (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
    (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧), ! sdmor c c' f)
    x),,
 (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
  ! nat_trans_ax
      (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
         (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
         (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
          ! sdmor c c' f0)) x y f)),,
(λ x : C₁,
 pr1
   (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
      (((λ x0 : C₁,
         make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
           (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
           (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
            ! sdmor c c' f) x0),,
        (λ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         ! nat_trans_ax
             (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                 ! sdmor c c' f0)) x0 y f)) x
       · # G (# K (identity x)))
      (# F (# K (identity x))
       · ((λ x0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
             (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
             (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c c' f) x0),,
          (λ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                  (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c c' f0)) x0 y f)) x)
      (section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ x0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
             (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
             (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c c' f) x0),,
          (λ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                  (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c c' f0)) x0 y f))
         (identity x))
      (id_disp
         (((λ x0 : C₁,
            make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
              (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
              (λ (c c' : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
               ! sdmor c c' f) x0),,
           (λ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
            ! nat_trans_ax
                (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                   (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                   (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                    ! sdmor c c' f0)) x0 y f)) x)))),,
(λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
 pr1
   (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
      (((λ x0 : C₁,
         make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
           (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
           (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
            ! sdmor c c' f0) x0),,
        (λ (x0 y0 : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
         ! nat_trans_ax
             (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                (λ (c c' : C₁) (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                 ! sdmor c c' f1)) x0 y0 f0)) x
       · # G (# K (f · g)))
      (# F (# K (f · g))
       · ((λ x0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
             (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
             (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c c' f0) x0),,
          (λ (x0 y0 : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                  (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c c' f1)) x0 y0 f0)) z)
      (section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ x0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
             (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
             (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c c' f0) x0),,
          (λ (x0 y0 : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                  (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c c' f1)) x0 y0 f0))
         (f · g))
      (section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ x0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
             (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
             (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c c' f0) x0),,
          (λ (x0 y0 : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                  (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c c' f1)) x0 y0 f0)) f ;; 
       section_disp_on_morphisms
         ((λ x0 : C₁,
           make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
             (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
             (λ (c c' : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
              ! sdmor c c' f0) x0),,
          (λ (x0 y0 : C₁) (f0 : C₁ ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
           ! nat_trans_ax
               (make_nat_trans (K ∙ F) (K ∙ G)
                  (λ c : C₁, sdob c)
                  (λ (c c' : C₁) (f1 : C₁ ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
                   ! sdmor c c' f1)) x0 y0 f0)) g)%mor_disp)) =
(sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
 (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! (! sdmor x y f))),,
(λ x : C₁,
 pr1
   (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
      (sdob x · # G (# K (identity x)))
      (# F (# K (identity x)) · sdob x)
      (! (! sdmor x x (identity x)))
      (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob x))
         (functor_id K x) (id_disp (sdob x))))),,
(λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
 pr1
   (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
      (sdob x · # G (# K (f · g)))
      (# F (# K (f · g)) · sdob z)
      (! (! sdmor x z (f · g)))
      (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob z))
         (functor_comp K f g)
         (! (! sdmor x y f) ;; (! (! sdmor y z g)))%mor_disp))) =
(sdob,, sdmor),, sdid,, sdcomp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
(λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! (! sdmor x y f)) =
sdob,, sdmor
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data
           (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
              (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)),
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; 
       section_disp_on_morphisms x g)%mor_disp)) 
  ?Goal
  ((λ x : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (identity x)))
         (# F (# K (identity x)) · sdob x)
         (! (! sdmor x x (identity x)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob x))
            (functor_id K x) 
            (id_disp (sdob x))))),,
   (λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (f · g)))
         (# F (# K (f · g)) · sdob z)
         (! (! sdmor x z (f · g)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob z))
            (functor_comp K f g)
            (! (! sdmor x y f) ;; (! (! sdmor y z g)))%mor_disp)))) =
sdid,, sdcomp

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
(λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! (! sdmor x y f)) =
sdob,, sdmor
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ x : C₁, sdob x) = sdob
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₃ ⟦ F (K x), G (K x) ⟧,
   ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · x y) 
  ?Goal0
  (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! (! sdmor x y f)) =
sdmor

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ x : C₁, sdob x) = sdob
 apply idpath.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₃ ⟦ F (K x), G (K x) ⟧,
   ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
   x x0 · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · x y)
  (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x))
  (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! (! sdmor x y f)) =
sdmor
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
(λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! (! sdmor x y f)) =
sdmor

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
x, x0: C₁
x1: C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
! (! sdmor x x0 x1) = sdmor x x0 x1

      apply pathsinv0inv0.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data
           (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
              (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)),
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · sdob y)
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G (# K f) =
              # F (# K f) · sdob t)
             (λ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
              ! (! sdmor x y f)) (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G (# K t) =
                  # F (# K t) · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₃ ⟦ F (K x), G (K x) ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · x y)
         (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x))
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁,
               Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
                 (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor x y f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor x y f)))) = pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ x : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (identity x)))
         (# F (# K (identity x)) · sdob x)
         (! (! sdmor x x (identity x)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob x))
            (functor_id K x) (id_disp (sdob x))))),,
   (λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (f · g)))
         (# F (# K (f · g)) · sdob z)
         (! (! sdmor x z (f · g)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob z))
            (functor_comp K f g)
            (! (! sdmor x y f) ;; (! (! sdmor y z g)))%mor_disp)))) =
sdid,, sdcomp
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data
           (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
              (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)),
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · sdob y)
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G (# K f) =
              # F (# K f) · sdob t)
             (λ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
              ! (! sdmor x y f)) (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G (# K t) =
                  # F (# K t) · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₃ ⟦ F (K x), G (K x) ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · x y)
         (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x))
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁,
               Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
                 (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor x y f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor x y f)))) = pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ x : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (identity x)))
         (# F (# K (identity x)) · sdob x)
         (! (! sdmor x x (identity x)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob x))
            (functor_id K x) (id_disp (sdob x))))),,
   (λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (f · g)))
         (# F (# K (f · g)) · sdob z)
         (! (! sdmor x z (f · g)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob z))
            (functor_comp K f g)
            (! (! sdmor x y f) ;; (! (! sdmor y z g)))%mor_disp)))) =
sdid,, sdcomp

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop goaltype
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
Hprop: isaprop goaltype
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data
           (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
              (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)),
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; 
       section_disp_on_morphisms x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f))) = 
      pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · sdob y)
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G (# K f) =
              # F (# K f) · sdob t)
             (λ (y : C₁) 
              (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! 
              (! sdmor x y f)) 
             (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G (# K t) =
                  # F (# K t) · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) 
                 (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ 
                  sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (y : C₁) 
               (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! 
               (! sdmor x y f)) ~ 
              sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₃ ⟦ F (K x), G (K x) ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · x y)
         (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x))
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁,
               Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
                 (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) 
             (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! 
             (! sdmor x y f))) = 
         pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) 
             (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧), ! 
             (! sdmor x y f)))) = 
      pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ x : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (identity x)))
         (# F (# K (identity x)) · sdob x)
         (! (! sdmor x x (identity x)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob x))
            (functor_id K x) 
            (id_disp (sdob x))))),,
   (λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (f · g)))
         (# F (# K (f · g)) · sdob z)
         (! (! sdmor x z (f · g)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob z))
            (functor_comp K f g)
            (! (! sdmor x y f) ;; (! (! sdmor y z g)))%mor_disp)))) =
sdid,, sdcomp

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
Hprop: isaprop goaltype
transportf
  (λ x : section_disp_data
           (Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
              (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)),
   (∏ x0 : C₁,
    section_disp_on_morphisms x (identity x0) =
    id_disp (x x0))
   × (∏ (x0 y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧)
      (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
      section_disp_on_morphisms x (f · g) =
      (section_disp_on_morphisms x f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                          x g)%mor_disp))
  (total2_paths_f
     (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
      :
      pr1
        ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
     ((funextsec
         (λ t : C₁,
          ∏ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ t, y ⟧),
          sdob t · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · sdob y)
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) sdmor
         ((λ x : C₁,
           funextsec
             (λ t : C₁,
              ∏ f : C₁ ⟦ x, t ⟧,
              sdob x · # G (# K f) =
              # F (# K f) · sdob t)
             (λ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
              ! (! sdmor x y f)) (sdmor x)
             ((λ x0 : C₁,
               funextsec
                 (λ t : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  sdob x · # G (# K t) =
                  # F (# K t) · sdob x0)
                 (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                  ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) (sdmor x x0)
                 ((λ x1 : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   pathsinv0inv0 (sdmor x x0 x1))
                  :
                  (λ f : C₁ ⟦ x, x0 ⟧,
                   ! (! sdmor x x0 f)) ~ sdmor x x0))
              :
              (λ (y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
               ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor x))
          :
          (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
           ! (! sdmor x y f)) ~ sdmor)
       :
       transportf
         (λ x : ∏ x : C₁, C₃ ⟦ F (K x), G (K x) ⟧,
          ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
          x x0 · # G (# K f) = # F (# K f) · x y)
         (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x))
         (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
          ! (! sdmor x y f)) = sdmor)
      :
      transportf
        (λ x : ∏ x : C₁,
               Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
                 (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x,
         ∏ (x0 y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
         x x0 -->[ f] x y)
        (idpath (λ x : C₁, sdob x)
         :
         pr1
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor x y f))) = pr1 (sdob,, sdmor))
        (pr2
           ((λ x : C₁, sdob x),,
            (λ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
             ! (! sdmor x y f)))) = pr2 (sdob,, sdmor)))
  ((λ x : C₁,
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K x))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (identity x)))
         (# F (# K (identity x)) · sdob x)
         (! (! sdmor x x (identity x)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob x))
            (functor_id K x) (id_disp (sdob x))))),,
   (λ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
    pr1
      (pr2 C₃ (F (K x)) (G (K z))
         (sdob x · # G (# K (f · g)))
         (# F (# K (f · g)) · sdob z)
         (! (! sdmor x z (f · g)))
         (transportb (mor_disp (sdob x) (sdob z))
            (functor_comp K f g)
            (! (! sdmor x y f) ;; (! (! sdmor y z g)))%mor_disp)))) =
sdid,, sdcomp
 apply Hprop. 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop goaltype

sdob: ∏ x : C₁,

  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;;

goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,

× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ x : C₁, sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) 
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ x : C₁, sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
∏ t : C₁,
isofhlevel 1
  (sdmor t t (identity t) = id_disp (sdob t))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
c: C₁
isofhlevel 1
  (sdmor c c (identity c) = id_disp (sdob c))

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
c: C₁
isofhlevel 0
  (sdmor c c (identity c) = id_disp (sdob c))

      apply C₃.
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
isaprop
  (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (sdmor t t1 (t2 · t3) =
   (sdmor t t0 t2 ;; sdmor t0 t1 t3)%mor_disp)

      
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K: C₁ ⟶ C₂
sdob: ∏ x : C₁,
Reindexing.reindex_disp_cat K
  (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) x
sdmor: ∏ (x y : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
sdob x -->[ f] sdob y
sdid: ∏ x : C₁,
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (identity x) =
id_disp ((sdob,, sdmor) x)
sdcomp: ∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
section_disp_on_morphisms 
  (sdob,, sdmor) (f · g) =
(section_disp_on_morphisms (sdob,, sdmor) f ;; 
 section_disp_on_morphisms 
   (sdob,, sdmor) g)%mor_disp
goaltype:= (∏ x : C₁,
 sdmor x x (identity x) = id_disp (sdob x))
× (∏ (x y z : C₁) (f : C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
   (g : C₁ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
   sdmor x z (f · g) =
   (sdmor x y f ;; sdmor y z g)%mor_disp): Type
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: C₁ ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
isofhlevel 0
  (sdmor t t1 (t2 · t3) =
   (sdmor t t0 t2 ;; sdmor t0 t1 t3)%mor_disp)

      apply C₃.
Qed.



C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K₁, K₂: C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
α: K₁ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K₂ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G
p: ∏ x : C₁,
pr2 (K₁ x) · # G (α x) = # F (α x) · pr2 (K₂ x)
K₁ ⟹ K₂


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K₁, K₂: C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
α: K₁ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K₂ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G
p: ∏ x : C₁,
pr2 (K₁ x) · # G (α x) = # F (α x) · pr2 (K₂ x)
K₁ ⟹ K₂

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K₁, K₂: C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
α: K₁ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K₂ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G
p: ∏ x : C₁,
pr2 (K₁ x) · # G (α x) = # F (α x) · pr2 (K₂ x)
nat_trans_data K₁ K₂
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K₁, K₂: C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
α: K₁ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K₂ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G
p: ∏ x : C₁,
pr2 (K₁ x) · # G (α x) = # F (α x) · pr2 (K₂ x)
is_nat_trans K₁ K₂ ?t

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K₁, K₂: C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
α: K₁ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K₂ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G
p: ∏ x : C₁,
pr2 (K₁ x) · # G (α x) = # F (α x) · pr2 (K₂ x)
nat_trans_data K₁ K₂
 exact (λ x, α x ,, p x).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
K₁, K₂: C₁ ⟶ dialgebra F G
α: K₁ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G ⟹ K₂ ∙ dialgebra_pr1 F G
p: ∏ x : C₁,
pr2 (K₁ x) · # G (α x) = # F (α x) · pr2 (K₂ x)
is_nat_trans K₁ K₂ (λ x : C₁, α x,, p x)
 abstract
      (intros x₁ x₂ f ;
       use eq_dialgebra ;
       exact (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f)).
Defined.

Section DialgebraEquivalence.
  Context {C₁ C₁' C₂ C₂' : category}
          {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₁'}
          {F' G' : C₂ ⟶ C₂'}
          {L : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
          (HL : adj_equivalence_of_cats L)
          {L' : C₁' ⟶ C₂'}
          (HL' : adj_equivalence_of_cats L')
          (α : nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L'))
          (β : nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')).

  Let R : C₂ ⟶ C₁
    := right_adjoint HL.
  Let R' : C₂' ⟶ C₁'
    := right_adjoint HL'.
  Let η : nat_z_iso (functor_identity _) (L ∙ R)
    := unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL.
  Let η' : nat_z_iso (functor_identity _) (L' ∙ R')
    := unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL'.
  Let ε : nat_z_iso  (R ∙ L) (functor_identity _)
    := counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL.
  Let ε' : nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity _)
    := counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL'.
  Let ηinv : nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity _)
    := nat_z_iso_inv η.
  Let ηinv' : nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity _)
    := nat_z_iso_inv η'.
  Let εinv : nat_z_iso  (functor_identity _) (R ∙ L)
    := nat_z_iso_inv ε.
  Let εinv' : nat_z_iso (functor_identity _) (R' ∙ L')
    := nat_z_iso_inv ε'.
  Let αinv : nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
    := nat_z_iso_inv α.
  Let βinv : nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
    := nat_z_iso_inv β.

  Definition dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data
    : nat_trans_data
        (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L ∙ F')
        (dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L ∙ G')
    := λ x,
       α (pr1 x)
       · #L' (pr2 x)
       · βinv (pr1 x).

  
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
is_nat_trans ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ F')
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ G')
  dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data

  
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
is_nat_trans ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ F')
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ G')
  dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F' (# L (pr1 f))
· dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data y =
dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data x
· # G' (# L (pr1 f))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F' (# L (pr1 f))
· (α (pr1 y) · # L' (pr2 y) · βinv (pr1 y)) =
α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x)
· # G' (# L (pr1 f))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F' (# L (pr1 f)) · α (pr1 y) · # L' (pr2 y)
· βinv (pr1 y) =
α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x)
· # G' (# L (pr1 f))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F' (# L (pr1 f)) · α (pr1 y) · # L' (pr2 y)
· βinv (pr1 y) = ?b
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x)
· # G' (# L (pr1 f))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F' (# L (pr1 f)) · α (pr1 y) · # L' (pr2 y)
· βinv (pr1 y) = ?b

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F' (# L (pr1 f)) · α (pr1 y) = ?y'

      apply (nat_trans_ax α).
    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
α (pr1 x) · # (F ∙ L') (pr1 f) · # L' (pr2 y)
· βinv (pr1 y) =
α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x)
· # G' (# L (pr1 f))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')

f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
α (pr1 x)
· (# (F ∙ L') (pr1 f) · (# L' (pr2 y) · βinv (pr1 y))) =
α (pr1 x)
· (# L' (pr2 x) · (βinv (pr1 x) · # G' (# L (pr1 f))))

η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# L' (pr2 x)
· (# L' (# G (pr1 f))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 β (pr1 y))) =
# L' (pr2 x)
· (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 β (pr1 x))
   · # G' (# L (pr1 f)))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
# L' (# G (pr1 f))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 β (pr1 y)) =
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 β (pr1 x))
· # G' (# L (pr1 f))

    apply (nat_trans_ax βinv).
  Qed.

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
nat_trans_data ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ F')
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ G')
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data.
    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
is_nat_trans ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ F')
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F G ∙ L) ∙ G')
  dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_is_nat_trans.
  Defined.

  Definition dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
    : dialgebra F G ⟶ dialgebra F' G'
    := nat_trans_to_dialgebra
         (dialgebra_pr1 _ _ ∙ L)
         dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans.

  Definition dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans_data
    : nat_trans_data
        (dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R ∙ F)
        (dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R ∙ G)
    := λ x,
       η' (F (R (pr1 x)))
       · #R' (αinv _ · #F' (ε _) · pr2 x · #G' (εinv _) · β _)
       · ηinv' _.

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
is_nat_trans ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ F)
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ G)
  dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans_data

is_nat_trans ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ F)
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ G)
  dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans_data

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ F) f
· dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans_data x₂ =
dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans_data x₁
· # ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ G) f

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F (# R (pr1 f))
· (η' (F (R (pr1 x₂)))
   · # R'
       (αinv (R (pr1 x₂)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x₂)) · pr2 x₂
        · # G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)) · β (R (pr1 x₂)))
   · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂)))) =
η' (F (R (pr1 x₁)))
· # R'
    (αinv (R (pr1 x₁)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x₁)) · pr2 x₁
     · # G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)) · β (R (pr1 x₁)))
· ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# F (# R (pr1 f))
· (η' (F (R (pr1 x₂)))
   · (# R' (αinv (R (pr1 x₂)))
      · # R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (pr2 x₂)
      · # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
      · # R' (β (R (pr1 x₂))))
   · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂)))) =
η' (F (R (pr1 x₁)))
· (# R' (αinv (R (pr1 x₁))) · # R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₁)))
   · # R' (pr2 x₁) · # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
   · # R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))) · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁)))
· # G (# R (pr1 f))

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R'
  (# L'
     (pr2 F (R (pr1 x₁)) (R (pr1 x₂)) (# R (pr1 f))))
· # R' (αinv (R (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₂)))
· # R' (pr2 x₂) · # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
· # R' (β (R (pr1 x₂))) · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))) =

· # G (# R (pr1 f))

     (pr2 F (R (pr1 x₁)) (R (pr1 x₂)) (# R (pr1 f))))

· # R' (pr2 x₂) · # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))

· (# R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₂)))

      · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
         · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
            · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))))))) =
# R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₁)))
· (# R' (pr2 x₁)
   · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
      · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
         · (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f))))))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (# F' (# L (# R (pr1 f))))
· (# R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₂)))
   · (# R' (pr2 x₂)
      · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
         · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
            · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))))))) =
# R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₁)))
· (# R' (pr2 x₁)
   · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
      · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
         · (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f))))))

· # R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (pr2 x₂)

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (# F' (# L (# R (pr1 f))))
· # R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (pr2 x₂)
· # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
· ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))) = ?b
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
?b =
# R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₁))) · # R' (pr2 x₁)
· # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁))) · 
# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁))) · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁)))
· # G (# R (pr1 f))

f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R (pr1 f)) · ε (pr1 x₂) = ?t2

      · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
         · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
            · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))))))) =
# R' (# F' (ε (pr1 x₁)))
· (# R' (pr2 x₁)
   · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
      · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
         · (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f))))))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (# F' (# (functor_identity C₂) (pr1 f)))
· (# R' (pr2 x₂)
   · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
      · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
         · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂)))))) =
# R' (pr2 x₁)
· (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
   · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
      · (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f)))))

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (# F' (pr1 f))
· (# R' (pr2 x₂)

      · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))

f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

· # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (# F' (pr1 f)) · # R' (pr2 x₂)
· # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂))) · # R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
· ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))) = ?b
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
?b =
# R' (pr2 x₁) · # R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
· # R' (β (R (pr1 x₁))) · 
ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · 
# G (# R (pr1 f))

# F' (pr1 f) · pr2 x₂ = ?t2

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (pr2 x₁)
· (# R' (# G' (pr1 f))
   · (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₂)))
      · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₂)))
         · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂)))))) =
# R' (pr2 x₁)
· (# R' (# G' (εinv (pr1 x₁)))
   · (# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
      · (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f)))))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
· (# R' (# (G ∙ L') (# R (pr1 f)))
   · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂)))) =
# R' (β (R (pr1 x₁)))
· (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f)))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# R' (# (G ∙ L') (# R (pr1 f)))
· ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₂))) =
ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x₁))) · # G (# R (pr1 f))

    apply (nat_trans_ax ηinv').
  Qed.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
is_nat_trans ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ F)
  ((dialgebra_pr1 F' G' ∙ R) ∙ G)
  dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans_data
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_is_nat_trans.
  Defined.

  Definition dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
    : dialgebra F' G' ⟶ dialgebra F G
    := nat_trans_to_dialgebra
         (dialgebra_pr1 _ _ ∙ R)
         dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_nat_trans.

  
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
dialgebra_mor_path F G (η (pr1 x))

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
