βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
dialgebra_mor_path F G (η (pr1 x))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x)) =
# F (η (pr1 x))
· pr2
    ((dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
      ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor) x)

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x)) =
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η'
     (F
        (R
           (pr1
              (L (pr1 x),,
               dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data x))))
   · # R'
       (αinv (R (L (pr1 x))) · # F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
        · pr2
            (L (pr1 x),,
             dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data x)
        · # G' (εinv (L (pr1 x))) · β (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x)) =
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η'
     (F
        (R
           (pr1
              (L (pr1 x),,
               α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x)))))
   · # R'
       (αinv (R (L (pr1 x))) · # F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
        · pr2
            (L (pr1 x),,
             α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x))
        · # G' (εinv (L (pr1 x))) · β (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x)) =
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · # R'
       (αinv (R (L (pr1 x))) · # F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
        · (α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x) · βinv (pr1 x))
        · # G' (εinv (L (pr1 x))) · β (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x)) =
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · (βinv (pr1 x)
                     · (# G' (εinv (L (pr1 x)))
                        · β (R (L (pr1 x)))))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x))))))

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · (βinv (pr1 x)
                     · (# G' (εinv (L (pr1 x)))
                        · β (R (L (pr1 x)))))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')

# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · (βinv (pr1 x)
                     · (# G' (εinv (L (pr1 x)))
                        · 
                        β (R (L (pr1 x)))))))))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
identity (functor_identity C₂ (L (pr1 x)))
· εinv (L (pr1 x)) = # L (η (pr1 x))

identity (functor_identity C₂ (L (pr1 x)))
· εinv (L (pr1 x))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
identity (functor_identity C₂ (L (pr1 x))) =
# L (η (pr1 x))
· (adjcounit (pr1 HL) (L (pr1 x)),,
   dirprod_pr2 (pr2 HL) (L (pr1 x)))

      exact (!(triangle_id_left_ad (pr21 HL) (pr1 x))).

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₁: εinv (L (pr1 x)) = # L (η (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · (βinv (pr1 x)
                     · (# G' (εinv (L (pr1 x)))
                        · β (R (L (pr1 x)))))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · (βinv (pr1 x)
                     · (# G' (εinv (L (pr1 x)))
                        · β (R (L (pr1 x)))))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) = ?b

ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₁: εinv (L (pr1 x)) = # L (η (pr1 x))
?b = pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₁: εinv (L (pr1 x)) = # L (η (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · (βinv (pr1 x)
                     · (# G' (εinv (L (pr1 x)))
                        · β (R (L (pr1 x)))))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) = ?b

  (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₁: εinv (L (pr1 x)) = # L (η (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · # L'
                      (# G
                         (unit_from_are_adjoints
                            (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · # L'
                      (# G
                         (unit_from_are_adjoints
                            (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · # L'
                      (# G
                        (unit_from_are_adjoints
                        (pr2 HL) 
                        (pr1 x)))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G

ε (L (pr1 x)) =
# L
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
?b =
# L
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor (dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))
 apply pathsinv0, (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso L (_,,dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))). 
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
ε (L (pr1 x)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_on_z_iso L
     (adjunit (pr1 HL) (pr1 x),,
      dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
ε (L (pr1 x)) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_on_z_iso L
     (adjunit (pr1 HL) (pr1 x),,
      dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))
· identity (L (pr1 x))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_on_z_iso L
     (adjunit (pr1 HL) (pr1 x),,
      dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))
· identity (L (pr1 x)) = ε (L (pr1 x))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
identity (L (pr1 x)) =
functor_on_z_iso L
  (adjunit (pr1 HL) (pr1 x),,
   dirprod_pr1 (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)) · ε (L (pr1 x))

      exact (!(triangle_id_left_ad (pr21 HL) (pr1 x))).

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · # L'
                      (# G
                         (unit_from_are_adjoints
                            (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
         · (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
            · (α (pr1 x)
               · (# L' (pr2 x)
                  · # L'
                      (# G
                         (unit_from_are_adjoints
                            (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) = ?b

αinv (R (L (pr1 x)))
· (# F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
   · (α (pr1 x)

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
αinv (R (L (pr1 x))) · # F' (ε (L (pr1 x)))
· α (pr1 x) · # L' (pr2 x)
· # L' (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))) =
?t2

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 α (R (L (pr1 x))))
· α (R (L (pr1 x))) · # L' (# F (ηinv (pr1 x))) = 
?b

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (η' (F (R (L (pr1 x))))
   · (# R'
        (# L' (# F (ηinv (pr1 x))) · # L' (pr2 x)
         · # L'
             (# G
                (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL)
                   (pr1 x))))
      · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (# (functor_identity C₁') (# F (ηinv (pr1 x)))
   · η' (F (pr1 x)) · # R' (# L' (pr2 x))
   · # R'
       (# L'
          (# G
             (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))
   · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x))
· (# F (ηinv (pr1 x)) · η' (F (pr1 x))
   · # R' (# L' (pr2 x))
   · # R'
       (# L'
          (# G
             (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))
   · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x))))) =
pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x)) · # F (ηinv (pr1 x)) · η' (F (pr1 x))
· # R' (# L' (pr2 x))
· # R'
    (# L'
       (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))
· ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))) = pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

· # R' (# L' (pr2 x))
· # R'
    (# L'
       (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))
· ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))) = ?b

C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x) · ηinv (pr1 x)) · η' (F (pr1 x)) = ?y'

# F (η (pr1 x) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η (pr1 x)))

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# F (η (pr1 x) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η (pr1 x))) =
?y'0

        
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
η (pr1 x) · is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η (pr1 x)) = ?t2

        exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (make_z_iso' _ _)).

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
η' (F (pr1 x)) · # R' (# L' (pr2 x))
· # R'
    (# L'
       (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))
· ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))) = pr2 x · # G (η (pr1 x))

   · ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x))))) = # G (η (pr1 x))

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
η' (G (pr1 x))
· # R'
    (# L'
       (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))
· ηinv' (G (R (L (pr1 x)))) = # G (η (pr1 x))

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')

H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
?y' =
η' (G (pr1 x))
· # R'
    (# L'
       (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x))))

      apply (nat_trans_ax η').

R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
η' (G (R (L (pr1 x))))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η' (G (R (L (pr1 x))))) =
?t2

      exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (make_z_iso' _ _)).
    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F G
H₂: ε (L (pr1 x)) = # L (ηinv (pr1 x))
# (functor_identity C₁')
  (# G (unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x)))
· identity (G (R (L (pr1 x)))) = # G (η (pr1 x))

    apply id_right.
  Qed.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# (functor_identity (dialgebra F G)) f
· dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit_data x₂ =
dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit_data x₁
· # (dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
     ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor) f

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
pr1 f · unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x₂) =
unit_from_are_adjoints (pr2 HL) (pr1 x₁)
· # R (# L (pr1 f))

    apply (nat_trans_ax η).
  Qed.

εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
functor_identity (dialgebra F G)
⟹ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
  ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')

dialgebra_mor_path F' G' (ε (pr1 x))

C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
pr2
  ((dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
    ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor) x)
· # G' (ε (pr1 x)) = # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
dialgebra_equivalence_nat_trans_data
  (R (pr1 x),,
   η' (F (R (pr1 x)))
   · # R'
       (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x
        · # G' (εinv (pr1 x)) · β (R (pr1 x)))
   · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))) · # G' (ε (pr1 x)) =
# F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
α
  (pr1
     (R (pr1 x),,
      η' (F (R (pr1 x)))
      · # R'
          (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x
           · # G' (εinv (pr1 x)) · β (R (pr1 x)))
      · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· # L'
    (pr2
       (R (pr1 x),,
        η' (F (R (pr1 x)))
        · # R'
            (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x))
             · pr2 x · # G' (εinv (pr1 x))
             · β (R (pr1 x))) · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· βinv
    (pr1
       (R (pr1 x),,
        η' (F (R (pr1 x)))
        · # R'
            (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x))
             · pr2 x · # G' (εinv (pr1 x))
             · β (R (pr1 x))) · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· # G' (ε (pr1 x)) = # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
α (R (pr1 x))
· # L'
    (η' (F (R (pr1 x)))
     · # R'
         (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x
          · # G' (εinv (pr1 x)) · β (R (pr1 x)))
     · ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))) · βinv (R (pr1 x))
· # G' (ε (pr1 x)) = # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
α (R (pr1 x))
· (# L' (η' (F (R (pr1 x))))
   · # L'
       (# R'
          (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x
           · # G' (εinv (pr1 x)) · β (R (pr1 x))))
   · # L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x))))) · βinv (R (pr1 x))
· # G' (ε (pr1 x)) = # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
α (R (pr1 x))
· (# L' (η' (F (R (pr1 x))))
   · (# L'
        (# R'
           (αinv (R (pr1 x))
            · (# F' (ε (pr1 x))
               · (pr2 x
                  · (# G' (εinv (pr1 x))
                     · β (R (pr1 x)))))))
      · (# L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x))))
         · (βinv (R (pr1 x)) · # G' (ε (pr1 x)))))) =
# F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

x: dialgebra F' G'
# L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))) = ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
H₁: # L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))) =
ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))
α (R (pr1 x))
· (# L' (η' (F (R (pr1 x))))
   · (# L'
        (# R'
           (αinv (R (pr1 x))
            · (# F' (ε (pr1 x))
               · (pr2 x
                  · (# G' (εinv (pr1 x))
                     · β (R (pr1 x)))))))
      · (# L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x))))
         · (βinv (R (pr1 x)) · # G' (ε (pr1 x)))))) =
# F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
# L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x)))) = ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x)))) =
# L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x))))
· identity (L' (functor_identity C₁' (G (R (pr1 x)))))

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x)))) =
# L' (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· identity (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x)))) = ?b

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
?b =
# L' (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· identity (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
?b =
# L' (is_z_isomorphism_mor (pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· identity (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))
 apply cancel_postcomposition, pathsinv0, (functor_on_inv_from_z_iso L' (_,,pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x))))). 
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x)))) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_on_z_iso L'
     (pr1 η' (G (R (pr1 x))),, pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· identity (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_on_z_iso L'
     (pr1 η' (G (R (pr1 x))),, pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x)))))
· identity (L' (G (R (pr1 x)))) =
ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
identity (L' (G (R (pr1 x)))) =
functor_on_z_iso L'
  (pr1 η' (G (R (pr1 x))),, pr2 η' (G (R (pr1 x))))
· ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))

      exact (!(triangle_id_left_ad (pr21 HL') (G (R (pr1 x))))).

F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'

HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'

ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))
α (R (pr1 x))
· (# L' (η' (F (R (pr1 x))))
   · (# L'
        (# R'
           (αinv (R (pr1 x))
            · (# F' (ε (pr1 x))
               · (pr2 x

                     · β (R (pr1 x)))))))
      · (# L' (ηinv' (G (R (pr1 x))))
         · (βinv (R (pr1 x)) · # G' (ε (pr1 x)))))) =
# F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
# L'
  (# R'
     (αinv (R (pr1 x))
      · (# F' (ε (pr1 x))
         · (pr2 x
            · (# G' (εinv (pr1 x)) · β (R (pr1 x)))))))
· (ε' (L' (G (R (pr1 x))))
   · (βinv (R (pr1 x)) · # G' (ε (pr1 x)))) = ?t2

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

x: dialgebra F' G'
α (R (pr1 x))
· (identity (L' (F (R (pr1 x)))) · αinv (R (pr1 x))
   · # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x · # G' (εinv (pr1 x))
   · β (R (pr1 x)) · βinv (R (pr1 x))
   · # G' (ε (pr1 x))) = # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x

α (R (pr1 x))
· (αinv (R (pr1 x)) · # F' (ε (pr1 x)) · pr2 x
   · # G' (εinv (pr1 x)) · β (R (pr1 x))
   · βinv (R (pr1 x)) · # G' (ε (pr1 x))) =

η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
# G' (εinv (pr1 x))
· (β (R (pr1 x))
   · (βinv (R (pr1 x)) · # G' (ε (pr1 x)))) = ?b

ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
# G' (identity (pr1 x)) = identity (G' (pr1 x))

    apply functor_id.
  Qed.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
nat_trans_data
  (dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor)
  (functor_identity (dialgebra F' G'))

      ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor) x),

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x: dialgebra F' G'
dialgebra_mor_path F' G' (ε (pr1 x))
 exact (dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit_path x).
  Defined.

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
is_nat_trans
  (dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor)
  (functor_identity (dialgebra F' G'))
  dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit_data

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'

L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# (dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor) f
· dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit_data x₂ =
dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit_data x₁
· # (functor_identity (dialgebra F' G')) f

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
x₁, x₂: dialgebra F' G'
f: dialgebra F' G' ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
# L (# R (pr1 f))
· counit_from_left_adjoint HL (pr1 x₂) =
counit_from_left_adjoint HL (pr1 x₁) · pr1 f

    apply (nat_trans_ax ε).
  Qed.

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
nat_trans_data
  (dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
   ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor)
  (functor_identity (dialgebra F' G'))

α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
equivalence_of_cats (dialgebra F G) (dialgebra F' G')

    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂

L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)

ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
adjunction_data (dialgebra F G) (dialgebra F' G')
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
forms_equivalence ?adjData

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')

βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
dialgebra F G ⟶ dialgebra F' G'
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor.

F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'

β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁

ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')

εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
dialgebra F' G' ⟶ dialgebra F G
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor.
      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
functor_identity (dialgebra F G)
⟹ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
  ∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit.
      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
∙ dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
⟹ functor_identity (dialgebra F' G')
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit.
    
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
forms_equivalence
  (make_adjunction_data
     dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
     dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
     dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit
     dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit)

η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')

ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
∏ a : dialgebra F G,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (make_adjunction_data
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit) a)
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
∏ b : dialgebra F' G',
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (make_adjunction_data
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit) b)

      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
∏ a : dialgebra F G,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (make_adjunction_data
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit) a)
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit_is_nat_z_iso.
      
C₁, C₁', C₂, C₂': category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₁'
F', G': C₂ ⟶ C₂'
L: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HL: adj_equivalence_of_cats L
L': C₁' ⟶ C₂'
HL': adj_equivalence_of_cats L'
α: nat_z_iso (L ∙ F') (F ∙ L')
β: nat_z_iso (L ∙ G') (G ∙ L')
R:= right_adjoint HL: C₂ ⟶ C₁
R':= right_adjoint HL': C₂' ⟶ C₁'
η:= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁) (L ∙ R)
η':= unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₁') (L' ∙ R')
ε:= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL: nat_z_iso (R ∙ L) (functor_identity C₂)
ε':= counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats HL': nat_z_iso (R' ∙ L') (functor_identity C₂')
ηinv:= nat_z_iso_inv η: nat_z_iso (L ∙ R) (functor_identity C₁)
ηinv':= nat_z_iso_inv η': nat_z_iso (L' ∙ R') (functor_identity C₁')
εinv:= nat_z_iso_inv ε: nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂) (R ∙ L)
εinv':= nat_z_iso_inv ε': nat_z_iso (functor_identity C₂') (R' ∙ L')
αinv:= nat_z_iso_inv α: nat_z_iso (F ∙ L') (L ∙ F')
βinv:= nat_z_iso_inv β: nat_z_iso (G ∙ L') (L ∙ G')
∏ b : dialgebra F' G',
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (make_adjunction_data
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_inv_functor
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_unit
        dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit) b)
 exact dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_counit_is_nat_z_iso.
  Defined.

  Definition dialgebra_adj_equivalence_of_cats
    : adj_equivalence_of_cats dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats_functor
    := adjointification dialgebra_equivalence_of_cats.
End DialgebraEquivalence.


Section DiAlgebraCoercions.

  Context {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}.

  Definition dialgebra_carrier (x : dialgebra F G)
    : ob C₁ := pr1 x.
  Definition dialgebra_map (x : dialgebra F G)
    : C₂⟦F (dialgebra_carrier x), G (dialgebra_carrier x)⟧ := pr2 x.

  Definition mor_from_dialgebra_mor {x y : dialgebra F G} (f : (dialgebra F G)⟦x,y⟧)
    :  C₁ ⟦ dialgebra_carrier x, dialgebra_carrier y ⟧ := pr1 f.

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
dialgebra_map x · # G (mor_from_dialgebra_mor f) =
# F (mor_from_dialgebra_mor f) · dialgebra_map y

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: dialgebra F G
f: dialgebra F G ⟦ x, y ⟧
dialgebra_map x · # G (mor_from_dialgebra_mor f) =
# F (mor_from_dialgebra_mor f) · dialgebra_map y

    exact (pr2 f).
  Qed.

End DiAlgebraCoercions.

Section AlgebrasAndCoalgebras.

  Definition FunctorAlg {C : category} (F : functor C C) : category
    := dialgebra F (functor_identity C).

  Definition CoAlg_category {C : category} (F : functor C C) : category
    := dialgebra (functor_identity C) F.

End AlgebrasAndCoalgebras.
